areas.title: Manifest contract
areas.evidence: Verifier passes the isolated scaffold contract.

areas.title: Event fits
areas.evidence: Catalog, launch, shell, and data rows are present per event fit.

areas.title: Launch plans
areas.evidence: Primary launch plans are generated for each event fit.

areas.title: Pool variants
areas.evidence: Recommended variants are present in primary or alternate launch plans.

areas.title: Mini-game launch coverage
areas.evidence: Recommended mini-games map to commands or activation tasks.

areas.title: Mini-game run plans
areas.evidence: Executable run plans exist for recommended mini-game specs.

areas.title: Aggregator routes
areas.evidence: Every fit has a normalized sports data route.

areas.title: Result settlement paths
areas.evidence: Every fit must have either source-of-truth auto settlement or a QVAC result-evidence settlement lane.

areas.title: Provider stack
areas.evidence: Provider matrix is available for route decisions.

areas.title: Tournament asset packs
areas.evidence: Each fit has required generated/licensed asset prompts.

areas.title: App surfaces
areas.evidence: The facade can derive home, discover, pool, pick, watch, game, creator, wallet, ops, and settings surfaces.

areas.title: Scenarios
areas.evidence: Manifest scenarios replay through the facade.

areas.title: User-facing v2 UI
areas.evidence: A dedicated ultimate sports UI folder exists.

areas.title: Live provider clients
areas.evidence: Server-side HTTP client request builders exist for API-backed aggregator sources; live credentials still need smoke verification.

areas.title: Provider smoke runner
areas.evidence: Redacted smoke-check plan covers 11 sources; 0/8 API checks are ready to call with current env.

areas.title: Preview journey smoke runner
areas.evidence: Served preview journey smoke script and regression test are in the manifest. Latest report: passed, 19/19 checks, 100% coverage.

areas.title: Generated visual assets
areas.evidence: 30/30 MMA generated asset outputs are present on disk.

areas.title: Pear worker bridge wiring
areas.evidence: Existing Pear worker bridge delegates optional nested ultimateSports requests into the isolated v2 bridge while preserving v1 actions.

previewJourneySmoke.evidence: Served preview journey smoke script and regression test are in the manifest. Latest report: passed, 19/19 checks, 100% coverage.

pearWorkerBridge.evidence: Existing Pear worker bridge delegates optional nested ultimateSports requests into the isolated v2 bridge while preserving v1 actions.

grindList.title: Build the actual ultimate sports app shell
grindList.nextStep: Create the Pear/Web renderer that consumes createTournamentShell, createExperience, and the standup audit data.

grindList.title: Implement real provider API clients behind the aggregator routes
grindList.evidence: Server-only request builders exist for every API-backed aggregator source, with redacted auth and credential readiness checks.
grindList.nextStep: Keep credentials server-side and run provider smoke checks as contracts are secured.

grindList.title: Verify provider credentials and contracts with live smoke checks
grindList.evidence: Smoke runner exists, but 8/8 API checks are missing required env in the current process.
grindList.nextStep: Run node platform/ultimate-sports/scripts/sports-data-smoke.js from the backend once contracted provider env vars are present, then store the redacted JSON report.

grindList.title: Prove no-API result settlement lanes
grindList.evidence: 9 fits have source-of-truth auto settlement and 3 fits use QVAC result-evidence settlement.
grindList.nextStep: Expose QVAC result-evidence status in result, dispute, and prize-settlement UI states while provider contracts are finalized.

grindList.title: Secure SailGP and premium sports data access
grindList.evidence: SailGP route is hybrid and keeps official web/QVAC fallback active.
grindList.nextStep: Confirm SailGP partner-feed availability and decide whether Stats Perform/Opta is worth licensing for soccer depth.

grindList.title: Generate and QA sport-specific asset packs
grindList.evidence: 30/30 MMA asset output targets are present. Status: generated-assets-ready-for-qa.
grindList.nextStep: Run visual QA, attach QVAC review evidence, and upload approved finals to the asset store/CDN.

grindList.title: Wire v2 commands through the existing Pear worker boundary
grindList.evidence: Existing Pear worker bridge delegates optional nested ultimateSports requests into the isolated v2 bridge while preserving v1 actions.
grindList.nextStep: Keep the optional ultimateSports action isolated from v1 startup, then add production Pear topic mapping when the v2 UI graduates from preview.

grindList.title: Add automated preview journey tests for the UI shell
grindList.evidence: Served preview journey smoke script and regression test are in the manifest. Latest report: passed, 19/19 checks, 100% coverage.
grindList.nextStep: Keep running npm run smoke:ultimate-preview for the isolated shell, then add screenshot/click automation when the preview graduates into a production Pear UI.

tasks.title: Decide whether Stats Perform / Opta is worth licensing
tasks.nextAction: Set backend-only env for stats-perform-opta: STATSPERFORM_API_KEY, STATSPERFORM_BASE_URL.
tasks.expectedEvidence: HTTP 2xx response from trusted secondary provider sample endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Decision is recorded as licensed, deferred, or rejected for MVP.
If licensed, the smoke check returns passed-live from the backend.
If deferred or rejected, aggregator routes continue to work through Sportradar/SportsDataIO/QVAC.

workstreams.summary: 30/30 generated asset outputs present; 13 Higgsfield jobs in the handoff.

tickets.title: Sportradar official sports APIs client
tickets.nextAction: Set backend-only env for sportradar-official: SPORTRADAR_API_KEY, SPORTRADAR_PRODUCT_CONFIG.
tickets.expectedEvidence: HTTP 2xx response from source-of-truth provider sample endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Required provider credentials are present only in the backend runtime.
The smoke check returns passed-live with an HTTP 2xx provider response.
The redacted smoke report stores status, duration, payload shape, and item count without credential values.

Fallback official web/QVAC evidence remains active for disputes or partner-feed outages.

tickets.title: Decide whether Stats Perform / Opta is worth licensing
tickets.nextAction: Set backend-only env for stats-perform-opta: STATSPERFORM_API_KEY, STATSPERFORM_BASE_URL.
tickets.expectedEvidence: HTTP 2xx response from trusted secondary provider sample endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Decision is recorded as licensed, deferred, or rejected for MVP.
If licensed, the smoke check returns passed-live from the backend.
If deferred or rejected, aggregator routes continue to work through Sportradar/SportsDataIO/QVAC.

tickets.title: Fight Card Lobby Icon
tickets.nextAction: Run visual QA, rights review, crop review, and attach QVAC/human review evidence.
tickets.expectedEvidence: Generated PNG/MP4 output files plus prompt metadata and visual QA evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Every required PNG and MP4 output target exists and is non-empty.
No official promotion logos, sponsor marks, broadcaster marks, venue marks, or real fighter likenesses are present.
Mobile crops preserve UI title, button, and card safe areas.
QVAC or human review evidence is attached before prize-mode promotion.

gates.title: Local Preview Standup
gates.evidence: Preview smoke passes and coverage is 100%.
acceptanceCriteria: Static preview shell loads generated snapshot data.
Preview journey smoke passes every dashboard, fit, aggregator, MMA, SailGP, and grind check.
Standup coverage remains at or above 90%.

gates.title: Replayable Demo Product
gates.evidence: 12 event fits launch, 6/6 scenarios replay, and all required surfaces are present.
acceptanceCriteria: Every catalog fit has launch, pool, mini-game, shell, data, and settlement coverage.
Every manifest scenario replays through the facade.
Home, Discover, Pools, Picks, Watch, Games, Creator, Wallet, Ops, and Settings surfaces are derivable from replay state.

gates.title: Live Provider Data
gates.evidence: 0/8 API smoke checks are ready; 8 checks blocked; 3 local evidence lanes ready.
blockers: 8 API checks are missing credentials or provider config.
A redacted passed-live smoke report has not been produced for every API-backed provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Every API-backed provider has backend-only credentials or a recorded MVP defer decision.
Every required smoke check returns passed-live or has an explicit QVAC/manual fallback policy.
The redacted smoke report stores provider status without credential values.

gates.title: Combat Generated Asset Pack
blockers: Visual QA and QVAC/human review evidence must be attached before prize-mode promotion.
acceptanceCriteria: Every required PNG and MP4 output target exists and is non-empty.
No official promotion logos, sponsor marks, broadcaster marks, venue marks, or real fighter likenesses are present.
Mobile crops preserve UI title, button, and card safe areas.
QVAC or human review evidence is attached before prize-mode promotion.

gates.title: Pear Production Integration
gates.evidence: Optional ultimateSports bridge action exists and preview smoke passes; production topic mapping remains a graduation task.
blockers: Final Pear UI routing is still isolated from the current PearCup start flow.
Production Pear topic/storage mapping for v2 rooms is not yet deployed.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing PearCup start/test flow remains unchanged.
V2 bridge actions remain optional and isolated until migration.
Final production UI and topic mappings are explicitly promoted when the preview graduates.

gates.title: Real-money / Prize-mode Readiness
gates.evidence: Real-money remains policy-gated; demo and sponsor-prize models exist, but regulated mode is intentionally disabled.
blockers: Real-money policy flag is disabled by default.
Compliance, payout recipient, processor evidence, live provider smoke, and asset QA evidence must be complete before live prize mode.
10 backlog tickets still depend on external credentials, contracts, or generated assets.
acceptanceCriteria: Real-money commands stay blocked until explicit policy opt-in.
Compliance, responsible-play, payout route, provider data, and QVAC evidence gates are complete.
No payout or prize route bypasses replay-bound settlement evidence.

commands.fullTests: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const manifest = require('./platform/ultimate-sports/platform.manifest.json'); const result = spawnSync(manifest.testCommand[0], manifest.testCommand.slice(1), { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status || 0)"
